response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced full-stack and backend engineer with a broad portfolio, but is fundamentally misaligned with this role. His technical stack is overwhelmingly JavaScript/TypeScript/Node.js/web-oriented; C++ appears only in a 6-month engagement at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis project, and is not even listed among his current skills. The role demands deep, current C++ and STL expertise for industrial-grade multi-threaded systems, which this resume does not evidence. Additionally, he has no apparent exposure to IEC 62443 secure development practices, industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, MQTT, OPC UA), or the industrial automation domain.
strengths: Long career (17+ years) with demonstrated breadth across distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and low-latency backend work (Sociomantic, Shopify).
Hands-on Agile practices including TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active mentoring through workshops and code katas.
Exposure to REST APIs, Node.js, and React, which partially overlap with the role's advantageous skills.
concerns: C++ is not a current or listed skill — last used briefly in 2014–2015; the entire 10+ year career since is built on JavaScript, TypeScript, and DLang.
No evidence of industrial automation domain knowledge, industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or IoT systems at the required depth.
No mention of Secure Development Lifecycle, IEC 62443, or any industrial cybersecurity practice, which are core to the role's security responsibilities.
